The '''Pembric Security Legion''' was the [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]] on [[Pembric II]]. When they were founded, they were an honest organization, but over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]], they were influenced by the growing criminal element present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. They became known for their corruption, and were allied with the [[Bombaasa Cartel]] by [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. They had acquired several [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] over the years, and modified them by sacrificing [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] and hull strength for extra speed and maneuverability. Members of the Security Legion were known as [[Pembric Security Legionnaires|Legionnaires]], and they were generally [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. In 8 ABY, they were led by [[Chief Magistrate (Pembric Security Legion)|Chief Magistrate]] [[Kebbo]], and enforced the will of the Bombaasa Cartel on the planet.
